core_mechanism: an obstruction/certificate argument in which the provable non-existence of a solution to a parameterized linear difference (telescoping) equation is used to certify the algebraic independence of the underlying objects
brief_reason: The abstract states that the non-existence of a (parameterized) creative-telescoping solution proves algebraic independence and transcendence of classes of sums, turning unsolvability of a linear recurrence-search into an independence certificate.
